list.empty_state_message: No Transmittals Found - Transmittals is where you keep documented records of any correspondence.
list.notes: List was empty at crawl time - column headers not captured in DOM

form_fields.label: Transmittals Private By Default
form_fields.description: Mark this checkbox to set all new transmittals to Private by default. A Private transmittal is visible only to users with Admin level permission, the creator, the recipients in the To and Cc fields, and members of the Default Distribution list.

form_fields.label: Default Distribution
form_fields.description: Add one or more people to the default distribution group. The system will automatically add these group members to new transmittals. Person must be added to the Project Directory first.

create_form_fields_inferred.source: permissions matrix, documentation, and URL patterns

fields.name: Number
fields.notes: Inferred from sort=number URL param and 'Number' as a common Procore transmittal field

fields.notes: Explicitly named in permissions documentation as a recipient field

fields.name: CC
fields.notes: Explicitly named in permissions documentation as a recipient field

fields.name: Description / Body

key_concepts.transmittal_definition: A documented record of any project-related correspondence
key_concepts.private_transmittal: Visible only to Admin users, the creator, To/CC recipients, and Default Distribution members

distribution_group_vs_list.distribution_group: Project-level setting; auto-added to all new transmittals (configured in Advanced Settings)

key_concepts.creator_role: The user who created the transmittal; has special access to private transmittals

items_vs_related_items.items: Files/documents attached directly to the transmittal
items_vs_related_items.related_items: Links to other Procore items (cross-tool references)
